name: dispatch_reviewer
description: Launch a Reviewer sub-agent to quality-check a Writer draft. The Reviewer verifies grounding, snippet accuracy, word count, coherence, and audience fit. Returns a JSON verdict (pass/warn/fatal). If verdict is fatal, you may re-dispatch the Writer once with the feedback; if still fatal after the second Writer attempt, call skip_lesson.

draft_path.description: File path to the Writer's draft markdown file (e.g. 'workspace/lesson-03/draft-001.md'). Must be an existing file produced by the most recent Writer call.

research_refs.description: Same list of research note file paths that was given to the Writer. The Reviewer uses these to verify grounding claims in the draft.
